nasb.text: By the seventh day God completed His work which He had done, and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had done.

esv.text: And on the seventh day God finished his work that he had done, and he rested on the seventh day from all his work that he had done.

cnv.text: 第七日，　神完成了他所作的工；在第七日　神歇了他所作的一切工。

ccb.text: 第七天，上帝完成了祂的创造之工，就在第七天歇了一切的工。

csbs.text: 到第七日，神已经完成了他所做的工，就在第七日安息了，歇了他所做的一切工。
